name: pi-mascot
description: Pi extension: copy current thread user and assistant messages to clipboard.
readme:
# pi-mascot

A Pi extension that adds a mascot.

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-mascot
```

From GitHub:

```bash
pi install git:github.com/RespectMathias/pi-mascot
```

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run check
npm run pack:dry
```
